properties.displayName: Deploy Azure Monitor Baseline Alerts (AMBA-ALZ) for Azure Virtual Machine Scale Set
properties.description: This initiative deploys Azure Monitor Baseline Alerts (AMBA-ALZ) to monitor Azure Virtual Machine Scale Set.

metadata.displayName: ALZ Monitor Resource Group Name
metadata.description: Name of the resource group where the ALZ Monitor resources will be deployed

metadata.displayName: ALZ Monitor Resource Group Tags
metadata.description: Tags for the resource group where the ALZ Monitor resources will be deployed

metadata.displayName: ALZ Monitor Resource Group Location
metadata.description: Location of the resource group where the ALZ Monitor resources will be deployed

metadata.displayName: ALZ Monitoring disabled tag name
metadata.description: Tag name used to disable monitoring at the resource level. Set to true if monitoring should be disabled.

metadata.displayName: ALZ Monitoring disabled tag values(s)
metadata.description: Tag value(s) used to disable monitoring at the resource level. Set to true if monitoring should be disabled.
The name of the user assigned managed identity to be created for monitoring purpose.
metadata.displayName: Name of the user assigned managed identity to be created.

metadata.description: The subscription ID of the management subscription where the user assigned managed identity will be created.
The resource Id of the user assigned managed identity provided by the customer.
metadata.displayName: Customer defined User Assigned managed Identity resource Id.
VMSS Heart Beat RG Alert Severity
metadata.description: Severity of the alert for VMSS Heart Beat RG

metadata.displayName: VMSS Heart Beat RG Window Size
VMSS Heart Beat RG Evaluation Frequency
VMSS Heart Beat RG Auto Mitigate
VMSS Heart Beat Require a workspace linked storage
metadata.description: Don't create the alert rule if the Log Analytics workspace doesn't have a configured linked storage account (relevant if you're using Customer Managed Keys).

metadata.displayName: VMSS Heart Beat RG Auto Resolve
VMSS Heart Beat RG Auto Resolve Time
metadata.description: Auto Resolve Time for the alert

metadata.displayName: VMSS Heart Beat RG Policy Effect
metadata.description: Policy effect for the alert, deployIfNotExists will deploy the alert if it does not exist

metadata.displayName: VMSS Heart Beat RG Alert State
VMSS Heart Beat RG Threshold
VMSS Heart Beat RG Operator
VMSS Heart Beat RG Time Aggregation
VMSS Heart Beat RG Failing Periods
